pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8, failing to leverage Java 11 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo (like 0.7.5) do not support Java 11 bytecode, leading to runtime errors or failure to generate coverage reports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject removed in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject was part of the Java EE module system removed in Java 11; code using it will fail to compile or run without an explicit dependency on the Jakarta or javax replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation removed in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was part of the Java EE module system removed in Java 11; code using it will fail to compile or run without an explicit dependency on the Jakarta or javax replacement.
